codeReview.summary: The fix correctly extends trait-method contracts to include receiver kind and enforces that comparison during impl validation. The diff and focused regression coverage match the feature requirements, and I did not find actionable code defects within scope.

summary: Reviewed the worker transcript skeleton, handoff, prior fix review, compiler-worker skill, architecture guidance, and commit 22cdab0. The implementation stores trait receiver kind in collected signatures, rejects impl receiver mismatches with a dedicated diagnostic, and adds focused positive/negative typecheck regressions covering the repaired behavior.
